segments.text: This tier three college student earns 24 lakhs without any IIIT degree. Recently,
a Reddit user shared how he went from earning 25,000 rupees to 24 lak rupees in [music] just 2 years. Here's what
actually happened. He didn't wait for college placement. Rather, [music] he started early. In his third year, he joined a startup as an SDE intern for
25,000 rupees [music] per month. Within 5 months, his responsibilities grew.
Stipen went to 35,000 rupees. Then in his final [music] year he switched internships. This one paid 45,000 rupees
per month and gave him real ownership. 6 months later he converted this into full-time at 12 lakh rupees perom. After
one year he reached 18 lakhs and the next hike led to 24 lakhs. Now here's the part most people ignore. He didn't keep switching jobs. He [music] stayed,
delivered results, built trust, took ownership. So how did he even get those early opportunities? He didn't rely on job portals. He [music] tracked recently
funded startups, found the founders on LinkedIn, and sent short personalized [music] messages. His story proves that skills plus initiative plus consistency
can beat pedigree, but only if you're optimizing [music] for the right thing.
What do you think about it? Let me know in the comments below.
